Bereneth's father lies wounded within the Houses of Healing, which are on the northern end of the Sixth Circle.
Bereneth's father, Araslant lies recovering in the Houses of Healing. If you should get separated from Bereneth, use Bergil's whistle to call her back…
The water cup is in Araslant's room in the Houses of Healing. Bring Bereneth's father, Araslant, the cup of water for him to drink.

The Old Guest-house lies in the First Circle, just south of the City Gates. Meet Bereneth back at the Old Guest-house.
